parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  account_name,
  COUNT(ticket_id) AS open_ticket_count,
  MIN(created_at) AS oldest_ticket_date,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT assignee_name ORDER BY assignee_name LIMIT 5) AS assignees
FROM `guesty-data.zendesk_analytics.tickets_clean`
WHERE ticket_status = 'open'
  AND group_name = 'Onboarding'
  AND created_at <= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)
  AND IFNULL(deleted, FALSE) = FALSE
  AND account_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY account_name
ORDER BY open_ticket_count DESC, oldest_ticket_date ASC
LIMIT 100
